40.1.2.12 - Rehabilitation Nursing 
(Rev. 1, 10-01-03) 
A3-3118.1.B.12, HHA-205.1.B.12 

Rehabilitation nursing procedures, including the related teaching and adaptive aspects of 
nursing that are part of active treatment (e.g., the institution and supervision of bowel and 
bladder training programs) would constitute skilled nursing services.
